free_text: The estimation of scission neutron parameters from
N-F and N-N angular correlations in U-235(Nth,F)
at variable angle between detectors and at
variable distances. Each detector was made on the
base of stilbene crystal of about 60 mm diameter,
about 40 mm thickness and FEU Hamamatsu R1307,
protected by 40 mm lead and 40 mm polyethylene.
Pulse shape - to split neutrons from gammas.
Every TOF spectrum consists of gamma-gamma, n-n
Energy sale was graduated by standard sources of Na-22,
About (7+-2)% of neutrons could be probably attributed
at 90 degrees, for different neutron energy threshold.
N-N coincidence count rate in arbitrary units.
corresponding TOF spectrum fitting., especially by
Data received from A.Vorobiev and I.Guseva.
Data are compared with exp. data of C.Franklyn+ .
